What else do you need to know?

Is it possible to exchange bonuses for soms?

Exchange of bonuses for soms is available only for clients with Platinum level

83% found this answer helpful

Was this answer helpful?

How to get maximum cashback?

In order to get the maximum cashback, you need to have the Platinum level. To get the Platinum level, you need to complete certain tasks for each level and upgrade it to the Platinum level.

91% found this answer helpful

Was this answer helpful?

What additional bonuses can you get for your birthday?
In honor of your birthday, we are giving away Platinum status for 7 days.
84% found this answer helpful

Was this answer helpful?

Which cards get Platinum level?

Owners of MBANK PREMIUM cards in som currency receive the Platinum level for the entire period of card ownership.

81% found this answer helpful

Was this answer helpful?

Who can become a participant in the Program?

All clients of the bank who have the MBANK mobile application, as well as a bank card and/or a payment account in our bank can participate in the MBonus Program. Participants can be residents and non-residents of Kyrgyzstan.

71% found this answer helpful

Was this answer helpful?

How to get rewards in the MBonus program?

To receive rewards, you need to complete certain tasks. Each level has its own tasks:

  • Money turnover: the amount of payments via a mobile application or card.
  • Number of payments: the number of payments via a mobile application or card.
  • Payment in certain categories: for example, Internet, utilities, and others.

Also available are the "Choose from" tasks:»:

  • Share of non-cash turnover: the ratio of the amount of non-cash payments (via the MBank mobile application or card) to the total amount of payments.
    • Credit activity: the amount of issued loans. You can find out more in the MBANK application → My bonuses → Tasks
89% found this answer helpful

Was this answer helpful?

What is MBonus?

MBonus – is a loyalty program for MBANK clients, where you can earn bonuses when making purchases from our partners via a mobile application or bank card. You can use these bonuses to pay for goods and services from more than 130 bank partners.

73% found this answer helpful

Was this answer helpful?

What rewards are available in the MBonus Loyalty Program?

The cashback amount depends on the level and the cashback determined by the partner!

Standard: up to 4% bonuses from purchases from partners

Bronze: up to 8% bonuses from purchases from partners

Standard: up to 12% bonuses from purchases from partners

Gold: up to 16% bonuses from purchases from partners

Platinum: up to 20% bonuses from purchases from partners, priority call to the call center
 

**The reward is not valid within the framework of the activity "Birthday Platinum Level"»

50% found this answer helpful

Was this answer helpful?

How to level up?

The first level in the loyalty program is – Silver. To increase the level or stay at the same level, complete the specified tasks depending on your level. 
The level is updated monthly, and depends on how successfully you have completed the tasks.

For example: Your level from January 1, 2024 is Silver. To get Platinum status, you need to complete the tasks specified for the Platinum level.

If the specified tasks were completed before February 1, 2024,то then your level will increase. Provided that one of the tasks is not completed by the first day of the next month, then the level: :

  • Remains the same
  • Increases, but to the Gold level
  • Decreases to the Bronze or Standard level

* When completing tasks, transfers within MBANK, to e-wallets and other banks, payments for mobile communications and loan repayment are not taken into account.

62% found this answer helpful

Was this answer helpful?

How to check the bonus accrual history?

Open MBANK → My bonuses → В Your balance. Accrued bonuses are marked in green, spent bonuses are marked in red.

83% found this answer helpful

Was this answer helpful?

I am a business owner and want to become a partner of the MBonus Loyalty Program. What do I need to do?

Leave a partnership application on the official website at the link.
After that, bank specialists will review your application and contact you.
Also, if you have MKASSA, you can leave a participation application directly from the MKASSA mobile application.

100% found this answer helpful

Was this answer helpful?

I had a higher level last month, why is it showing a different level now?

If one of the tasks is not completed by the first of the next month, your level will remain the same or may be lowered depending on how successfully the tasks are completed.

100% found this answer helpful

Was this answer helpful?

How to accumulate bonuses?

Make payments to more than 130 partners of our bank, pay for goods and services, Internet, utilities and much more. 

There are 2 payment methods for which cashback is accrued:

  • QR
  • Card

The payment method is different for some partners.
To check which payment method to use
Go to MBonus  → Click on the partner and a window with detailed information about the partner will appear.

71% found this answer helpful

Was this answer helpful?

How can I spend bonuses?

Accumulated bonuses can be spent when paying by scanning QR code through our bank’s QR terminals. Bonuses can be used to pay for goods and services partially or in full.

You can also spend bonuses in the Payments tab: utilities, Internet, fines, taxes and much more.
You cannot spend bonuses when paying for mobile communications or replenishing electronic wallets.

You can spend accumulated bonuses in several ways:

  1. You can use them to pay by scanning QR code through our bank’s QR terminals. Bonuses can be used to pay for goods and services partially or in full. However, cashback is not accrued when paying with bonuses. 
  2. You can spend bonuses to pay for various services, such as utilities, Internet, fines and taxes, through the "Payments" section. Remember that you cannot use bonuses to pay for mobile communications or replenish electronic wallets.

 

If the "Spend bonuses" window appears when paying, you can pay for the purchase

If there is no such window when paying, then accordingly bonuses cannot be used

 

70% found this answer helpful

Was this answer helpful?
